notes: Compound noun: Haus (house) + Tier (animal). Refers to animals kept at home as companions.

sentences.german: Viele Kinder wünschen sich ein Haustier.
sentences.english: Many children wish for a pet.

sentences.german: Welche Haustiere darf man in dieser Wohnung halten?
sentences.english: Which pets are allowed in this apartment?
